title: [FIRRTL] IMDCE should remove dead modules
body:
IMDCE should remove dead modules (unreachable modules & empty modules) in the post processing. 
```scala
circuit Foo:
  module Foo:
    input clock: Clock

    inst other of Other

  module Other:
    output out: UInt<1>
    out <= UInt<1>(0)
```
current output:
```
module Foo(     // foo.fir:2:10
  input clock);

  Other other ();       // foo.fir:5:5
endmodule

module Other(); // foo.fir:7:10
endmodule
```


Expected output:
```
module Foo(     // foo.fir:2:10
  input clock);

endmodule
```
